title: viburnum costaricanum
intro: Viburnum costaricanum, also known as the Guatemalan cranberry tree, is a deciduous shrub native to Central America, characterized by its small white flowers and red berries. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Viburnum costaricanum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. Viburnum costaricanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
